description_long: This object is a modern tactical shotgun with a sleek, black finish and a robust, angular frame. It features a prominent barrel with an attached cylindrical suppressor or compensator, and a visible under-barrel accessory, possibly a flashlight or laser module. The stock is a skeletonized thumbhole design, providing ergonomic support and reduced weight, while the pistol grip is integrated into the frame for enhanced control. The receiver is equipped with a rail-mounted optical sight, and the magazine appears to be detachable, suggesting a semi-automatic action. The overall construction is primarily metal with some polymer components, and the design is optimized for urban tactical use.
description: A modern tactical shotgun with a black skeletonized thumbhole stock, rail-mounted optic, and under-barrel accessory, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle, suppressor, and a glimpse of the under-barrel accessory.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the full length of the barrel, optical sight, thumbhole stock, and under-barrel attachment.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the stock's structure, pistol grip, and the alignment of the barrel and sight.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the magazine, trigger area, and the overall tactical design.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with attached cylindrical suppressor or compensator; no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, rounded trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
